description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a wood-textured exterior and a large, slightly recessed display screen framed by a dark bezel. The control panel is set below the screen and includes a single red joystick and two red buttons, all arranged on a striped surface. The upper section of the cabinet has a perforated grille where a marquee would typically be, but no artwork or lighting is visible. The side panels are plain, showcasing a wood grain finish without any decals or graphics. The lower front panel is a lighter beige color, contrasting with the darker wood tones above. The cabinet stands on four short legs, giving it a sturdy, grounded appearance suitable for placement in arcades, entertainment venues, or urban public spaces.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with a wood-textured finish, a large display screen, and a simple control panel featuring a joystick and two buttons. The cabinet has a plain design with no visible artwork or side graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and the perforated grille above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood grain texture and the profile of the cabinet's sloped upper section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with a two-tone finish and no visible access panels or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the cabinet's depth and wood grain finish.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size, with a thick black bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick and two red buttons arranged in a row on a striped panel
